If linked to equity positions, {{engine:HK_FSIE_EQUITY_HOLDING}} may apply. If tied to debt instruments, {{engine:DE_KSTG_8A_ZINSSCHRANKE}} or {{engine:US_IRC_163J_INTEREST_LIMIT}} could be relevant. No specific rule governs the balance sheet item 'Cash Equivalents' as a standalone asset.
